meaning: n.轻推,轻撞,漫步v.轻推,(使)蹒跚行进,(使)慢跑
examples: I got up early the next morning to jog.
We plan to go for a jog together.
People jog and bike up and down there.
Norfolk Police said they hoped the anniversary would jog memories and provide vital, fresh information.
The two men used to jog together, Curseen faithfully running three miles, three days a week.
